posts.title: NQ Recap: Week of April 14, 2026
posts.excerpt: A measured week for NQ. +$2,314 Micro P&L across 11 signals with 55% win rate. Five Trend variants, three Drift, two ORB, one Short-ORB. Thursday post-CPI Trend (T3) setup was the textbook trade of the week.
posts.author: Rob Gorham

posts.title: NQ vs ES Futures: Which Should You Trade?
posts.excerpt: Comprehensive comparison of NQ (Nasdaq-100 E-mini) and ES (S&P 500 E-mini) futures. Volatility, sector concentration, liquidity, and which one fits systematic vs discretionary traders.
posts.author: Rob Gorham
keywords: nq or es which is better

posts.title: What a Valid 15-Year Futures Backtest Actually Looks Like
posts.excerpt: Most retail traders have never seen a legitimate long-running futures backtest. This is the full STS Futures 15-year record (7,960 trades) with year-by-year returns, drawdown, and the years that lost money. Plus five questions to demand from any signal service.
posts.author: Rob Gorham

posts.title: How to Trade NQ Futures Signals: A Systematic Approach
posts.excerpt: A step-by-step guide to trading Nasdaq-100 E-mini futures using a systematic, rules-based approach. Covers what NQ signals are, how to execute them, position sizing, risk management, and what to expect from a real 15-year track record.
posts.author: Rob Gorham
keywords: how to trade nq futures signals
